taxonomy: Camarotis rostrata is a species of moth in the family Erebidae. It was described by Francis Walker in 1862. The classification of this species is as follows: Camarotis rostrata belongs to the kingdom Animalia, phylum Arthropoda, class Insecta, order Lepidoptera, family Erebidae, and genus Camarotis. Within the family Erebidae, it is placed in the subfamily Herminiinae. The exact classification may be subject to change as new research and discoveries emerge.
